steps.title: Recognize the cause-effect relationship
steps.content: The passage establishes that TMAO strengthens bonds between water molecules. The next sentence—beginning with the blank—continues by saying these water molecules maintain their structure, with “thus preventing damage” indicating the ultimate result. The transition must connect the cause (strengthened bonds) to the effect (maintained structure).

steps.title: Select the cause-effect transition
steps.content: ”As a result” directly expresses this consequence: strengthened bonds cause water molecules to maintain their structure. The others introduce contrast relationships or examples, neither of which fits this cause-effect pattern. That matches choice B — B is correct.
